=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/preferSchemaTypeProperty_preview.ts(5,13): error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)


==== /.src/preferSchemaTypeProperty_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    const User = Schema.Struct({ name: Schema.String })
    type User = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof User>
                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
